name: EuiCommentList

aria-label.description:
Defines a string value that labels the current element.
@see aria-labelledby.

comments.description: List of comments to render. See {@link EuiComment}

gutterSize.description: Sets the size of the vertical space between each comment

example: <EuiCommentList gutterSize="l" username="janed" timelineAvatarAriaLabel="Jane Doe" event="added a comment" timestamp="on Jan 1, 2020" />
